text: This environment feels purposefully structured and engineered—a glass-walled meeting room next to an exhibit space devoted to research, development, and thought. The coldness of glass and steel is softened by the intellectual warmth of curiosity and discovery all around me. As I stand in the corridor, I sense a crossroads of collaboration and questioning, sharpened by the invitation to pause, listen, and reflect on humanity’s journey with knowledge. There is a subtle thrill here: the energy of ideas in motion, waiting for minds willing to explore them.
